# Peace Solar & Window Cleaning
> Professional solar panel cleaning, window cleaning, bird proofing, and holiday lighting services in the Coachella Valley, California.

## About
Peace Solar & Window Cleaning is a locally owned and operated home services company founded by Jack and Ben. We serve residential and commercial properties across the Coachella Valley including Palm Desert, La Quinta, Indio, Rancho Mirage, Cathedral City, Coachella, Indian Wells, and Bermuda Dunes.

## Services
- **Solar Panel Cleaning**: Professional cleaning to restore full energy output. Desert dust and debris can reduce solar panel efficiency by up to 30%.
- **Window Cleaning**: Interior and exterior window cleaning for homes and businesses. Streak-free results guaranteed.
- **Bird Proofing**: Solar panel bird proofing and pigeon guard installation to prevent nesting damage under panels.
- **Holiday Lighting**: Professional holiday light installation and removal for residential and commercial properties.

## Subscription Packages
- **One-Time Cleaning**: Single service at full price
- **Bi-Annual Basic**: 10% off each clean, scheduled 2x per year
- **Quarterly Pro Package**: 20% off each clean, scheduled 4x per year, includes unlimited rain insurance (most popular)

## Service Area
Coachella Valley, California: Palm Desert, La Quinta, Indio, Rancho Mirage, Cathedral City, Coachella, Indian Wells, Bermuda Dunes

## Contact
- Phone: (760) 299-5187
- Website: https://peace-services.com
- Quote: https://peace-services.com (click "Get a Quick and Easy Quote")

## Key Facts
- 400+ families served
- 100+ five-star Google reviews
- 5.0 average rating
- Locally owned and operated
- Serves both residential and commercial properties
- Targets: homeowners with solar panels, HOA communities, property managers, snowbirds, new desert homeowners
